do_not_change_yet: Do not change live routes, panel weights, promotion gates, Mustard X scoring, options scoring, or giveback logic.
Do not blend EXPERIMENT or RESEARCH_NOTE evidence into normal score partitions.
Do not loosen route-lock blocks based on isolated winners inside net-losing blocked cohorts.
money_risks: Mistaking ghost volume for executable expectancy.
Promoting Mustard X before realized R exists.
Treating missing or stale options maps as valid agreement.
open_questions: Are all 31 entered Mustard trades represented with enough detail for later closed-trade scoring?
Did any Mustard positions close after packet generation?
Can options context become fresh enough for true agreement testing?
priority_actions: Keep Short Genesis in certified-normal confirmation only; do not promote from this packet.
Admit Mustard X fresh deep-stack, fresh lone-parent runner, exhausted-parent avoid, and bottom-channel highway ideas as shadow specs before scoring them.
Treat options/gap clear-highway agreement as a data-quality and shadow-test question until fresh fully checked samples exist.
agent_reviews.summary: Evidence is useful for research but not promotion-grade. The packet is EXPERIMENT_ONLY, AI learning cannot affect the bot, Mustard X has 40 candidates with 31 entered but 0 graded and no realized R, and panel live P/L is slightly negative.
top_evidence: Short Genesis is the only positive promotion candidate, but it is ghost-only here: edge_r 0.0822 over 10391 ghost-graded samples, 0 actual trades, blocked by certification.
Mustard X is not money-proven yet: 40 candidates, 31 entered, 9 pending, 0 graded, avg max favorable R 0.0089, no realized R.
Gap/options agreement is mostly not measurable: only 6 fully checked traces out of 1963; 1536 NO_MAPS; 1535 options missing; 1724 options not fresh.
Route-lock blocking has the clearest money relevance: gap_reject_short and live_fire_dump blocked cohorts each show about -0.34R average result over more than 450 graded samples.
watch_next_session: Mustard realized R after actual closes, not open marks.
Whether fresh-parent Mustard cohorts outperform exhausted-parent cohorts after 20 to 30 forward samples.
Whether options freshness improves enough to compare gap-only against fresh gap+options agreement.
Any certified-normal day that confirms or rejects Short Genesis.

do_not_change_yet: Do not loosen giveback, max-position, max-entry, stop-geometry, source-freshness, or route-lock gates.
Do not tune Mustard or gap/options behavior from open and ungraded trades.
Do not promote Short Genesis while certification is EXPERIMENT_ONLY.
money_risks: False confidence from stale reconcile can hide bad exits or missing protection.
Open/pending Mustard concentration with 0 graded outcomes can turn unproven theory into exposure.
The packet includes risk per share but not enough share quantity or dollar-risk detail to fully audit sizing.
open_questions: Are stale fill and exit reconcile ledgers intentionally offline, or failing during RTH?
What live path still depends on legacy trade permission?
What are per-position quantities, notional exposure, and dollar risk for the 9 positions?
priority_actions: Treat stale contract health as the top execution risk before trusting fill, exit, or score conclusions.
Keep route locks hard on dump and short routes while current blocked cohorts remain net negative.
Audit permission-enforcement semantics before any live expansion, especially paths that rely on trade_permission_enforce or legacy permission flags.
Keep Mustard evidence research/shadow until closed and graded outcomes exist.
agent_reviews.summary: Broker reconcile is clean, but execution confidence is limited by stale health and reconcile sources. The current risk is not an obvious unprotected position; it is trusting incomplete operational evidence during RTH.
top_evidence: Broker reconcile shows connected=true, 9 open orders, 9 positions, 0 unprotected positions, 0 orphan exits, and 0 invalid entry-like orders.

Contract health is FAIL with stale dashboard, breach, accountability, fill reconcile, exit reconcile, ghost ledger, route readiness, decision obligation, live-fire accounting, runtime drift, and live readiness checks.
Gate audit shows route_lock_enforce=true, gate_router_enforce=true, source_freshness_enforce=true, daily_pnl_guard_enforce=true, but trade_permission_enforce=false.
Panel score shows 15 actual trades, 10 actual closed, and actual realized P/L -24.5446.
watch_next_session: Any order or fill while fill and exit reconcile remain stale.
Pending Mustard entries converting after stale source windows.
Slippage outliers on wide-risk names such as SRRK, EPC, and PBF.
Any route firing through legacy or non-enforced permission paths.

do_not_change_yet: Do not change panel weights, route locks, promotion gates, giveback guard, Mustard logic, or gap/options scoring.
Do not promote Short Genesis despite positive ghost edge.
Do not use this packet to certify normal-score learning.
money_risks: Scoring or promoting from incomplete/stale spine evidence.
Live entries whose panel score or permission rationale is not provable after the fact.
Assuming broker-clean means score-clean when accountability ledgers are stale.
open_questions: Was EPC score 12 intentionally allowed by route permission, or is it a score-gate trace issue?
Why are several live proof ledgers stale while broker reconcile sees active positions and orders?
Are stale June 26 certification and promotion inputs intended for today's June 29 review?
priority_actions: Refresh and verify stale contract ledgers before trusting closed-loop scoring.
Reconcile live orders and fills against decision trace IDs because active broker state exists while several proof ledgers are stale.
Investigate why a low-score Mustard row could enter, as an advisory trace-integrity question only.
Keep all AI and promotion evidence quarantined as experiment/research.
agent_reviews.summary: The spine is structurally gated, and promotion integrity is clean, but live proof is incomplete because health is FAIL, certification is EXPERIMENT_ONLY, and several accountability sources are stale.
top_evidence: Promotion gate reports 0 normal partition leaks and 0 forward-order breaches, with Short Genesis blocked by EXPERIMENT_ONLY certification.
Broker reconcile sees 9 positions and 9 open orders, but health reports stale fill, exit, ghost, decision, and live-fire ledgers.
Mustard forward has 40 candidates, 31 entered, 9 pending, 0 graded, no realized R, and all sampled candidate rows show OPTIONS MISSING.
One sampled Mustard row, EPC, has score 12 and entered, which deserves trace review before drawing score-integrity conclusions.
watch_next_session: Every pick should map to decision, order, fill, exit, realized result, and score partition with one trace key.
Low-score entered rows and their permission rationale.
Whether open Mustard trades close into usable realized R.
Whether stale June 26 certification and promotion inputs are refreshed for the June 29 session.

do_not_change_yet: Do not promote Mustard X, bottom-channel gap-highway long, or options-gap agreement.
Do not change live gates, route permissions, panel weights, or exit behavior from this packet.
Do not read OPTIONS MISSING as bearish conflict; it is missing evidence.
money_risks: False confidence from rich-looking maps where most traces lack full gap/options validation.
Parent shelves may hold without producing monetizable R.
Data risk from stale certification and promotion inputs dated June 26 while the packet is June 29.
open_questions: Where are explicit channel location and options wall levels for the Mustard candidates?
Are the detailed Mustard rows materially different from the rest of the 40 candidates?
Does fresh gap+options agreement outperform gap-only after 30 clean shadow samples?
priority_actions: Treat gap/options/highway agreement as a shadow hypothesis only.
Require fresh options context before judging options-wall confirmation next session.
Track whether intact parent shelves convert into realized R, not just no-breach status.
Compare gap-only picks with fresh gap+options agreement after clean samples.
agent_reviews.summary: Auction/options alignment is mostly unknown, not confirmed. Parent shelves are intact so far, but the options wall and highway thesis is missing fresh coverage and has no graded monetization proof yet.
top_evidence: Gap/options is fully checked on only 6 of 1963 traces.
Options missing or stale dominates: 1535 options missing, 1724 options not fresh, 189 options stale.
Mustard forward rows all show OPTIONS MISSING and clear_highway_gap_and_options=false in sampled details.
Parent shelves are intact so far: parent_breach_rate 0.0 and parent_breaches 0, but there is no realized R yet.
watch_next_session: Whether detailed candidates get fresh options walls and actual graded exits.
Parent shelf breaches after entry, especially high parent_genesis_rank_pct names.
Slippage outliers like SRRK 0.7678%, EPC 0.581%, and PBF 0.3796%.

do_not_change_yet: Do not modify bot configuration, route policy, trade permissions, panel scores, gates, registry phases, order execution, or live trading behavior from this review.
Do not promote Short Genesis, Mustard X, bottom-channel highway, or options/gap agreement into normal/live scoring.
Do not loosen giveback, source freshness, route lock, max-position, max-entry, stop-geometry, or promotion gates.
Do not blend EXPERIMENT or RESEARCH_NOTE evidence into normal score partitions.
Do not treat missing or stale options data as confirmation or conflict.
money_risks: Stale proof ledgers can make a true-looking dashboard read misrepresent live reality.
Open and ungraded Mustard exposure can turn a research thesis into live P/L before expectancy is known.
Ghost evidence can dominate the packet and hide weak actual realized performance.
Missing or stale options maps can create false confidence in gap/options agreement.
Permission and trace gaps can make a live entry hard to attribute, audit, or score correctly.
open_questions: Are June 26 certification and promotion-gate sources intentionally reused for the June 29 packet, or should they be refreshed?
Why are multiple contract health proof ledgers stale during RTH while broker reconcile sees active orders and positions?
Was the low-score EPC Mustard entry intentionally allowed, and what decision/permission trace explains it?
Can options context become fresh enough to produce at least 30 clean gap+options agreement samples?
What are the share quantities, notional exposure, and dollar risk for the 9 reconciled positions?
priority_actions: Refresh and verify health, certification, promotion gate, fill reconcile, exit reconcile, ghost ledger, decision obligation, route readiness, and live-fire accounting before trusting session conclusions.
Keep Short Genesis confirmation-only until a certified-normal day validates it with contract-complete forward evidence.
Convert Mustard X and options/gap agreement ideas into admitted shadow specs with explicit kill criteria and clean forward samples.
Verify that every actual trade preserves one trace from candidate and decision through order, fill, exit, realized R/PnL, and score partition.
Keep route locks hard on currently net-negative blocked cohorts while gathering certified-normal evidence.
llm_call.synthesis: The live LLM call should stay advisory and research-only. The system has useful signals, especially route locks that appear protective and a Short Genesis ghost candidate worth certified-normal confirmation, but the June 29 packet is not promotion-ready: certification is EXPERIMENT_ONLY, contract health is FAIL due stale proof ledgers, Mustard X is open/ungraded with no realized R, and gap/options confirmation is mostly missing or stale. The highest-value next move is freshness and attribution discipline, not changing live behavior.
watch_next_session: Freshness of contract health, certification, promotion gate, fill/exit reconcile, ghost ledger, route readiness, and live readiness during RTH.
Mustard X closes: realized R, stop/target outcomes, parent shelf breaches, slippage, and whether options context was fresh at decision time.
Short Genesis behavior on the next certified-normal day.
Gap/options fully checked coverage and fresh agreement buckets versus gap-only controls.
Any low-score entered row or experiment/nontradable route reaching an order.

operator_read: The live LLM call should stay advisory and research-only. The system has useful signals, especially route locks that appear protective and a Short Genesis ghost candidate worth certified-normal confirmation, but the June 29 packet is not pr
